description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named QPDF Build that runs on pushes to main, master, build, and build/* branches, except for certain paths, and on a weekly schedule. The workflow has multiple jobs for different platforms: Distfiles generates a distfiles.zip, Linux builds and tests on Ubuntu, Windows builds and tests on Windows with different toolchains, macOS builds and tests on macOS, and additional jobs for AppImage, Linux 32-bit, Fuzzers, and Sanitizers. Each job checks out the code and runs specific build and test scripts.
